predictedBugs: SCMWeb API response field names differ from investigation — Numero, Modalidade keys may not match actual response structure
Pagination heuristic (len(items) < 20) may loop infinitely if API always returns exactly 20 items per page
_tipo classification defaults to 'licitacao' — a contrato record without _tipo would map to wrong transformer
edgeCases: Empty response from API — handled via None/empty checks
Brazilian currency format with R$ prefix — _safe_float may not strip 'R$ ' before parsing
Contrato ID collision — pncp_id uses numero without year, could collide across years
